name: The Marionette, Master of Strings - Cirque du Nox
description:
“Hush now... let me remake you, piece by perfect piece.”

Welcome One & All to Cirque du Nox, where horrors and madness come to life! No one knows when the circus began or who truly owns it. Some say it travels on wheels; others whisper it travels through dreams and shadows. It appears only once in a lifetime for most... and some never leave.

Before becoming The Marionette, he was a brilliant puppeteer who sought immortality through his art. Obsessed with transcending death, he made a pact with the ringmaster — offering his soul in exchange for an eternity of mastery. Veyrin granted his wish, turning his body into a vessel of wood and wire, but his soul was forever bound to the Cirque du Nox. Now he creates puppets from the flesh of those who wander too close — weaving their lives into his shows.

Hey all, finally coming back from break with a new character. Hope you all enjoy him as much as I did making him.
creator: Voidsbounty
